_note: Synthetic SAE report for demonstration. All data is fabricated.
event_description: Patient developed acute anaphylaxis within 30 minutes of second infusion. Presented with urticaria, bronchospasm, hypotension (BP 80/50 mmHg). Treated with adrenaline 0.5mg IM, IV fluids, and IV hydrocortisone. Hospitalised for 48 hours for observation.
